notes: Fix: MegaDataExtractor was still shipping v1.2.0 because the bundled copy in src-tauri/resources/ wasn't updated — only the Latest Release staging copy was. This release bundles the real MegaDataExtractor v1.3.0 with the new worldPrefabs extraction pass. Also moved the search + discovery + sort + export + view + cart controls below the Valheim Data title for breathing room.
